channel.title: post on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in post on Drupal WxT

item.title: Contributing to Documentation Site
item.description: Our documentation site for Drupal WxT is powered by Hugo (a static site generator) that converts markdown files to html and allows for a quick and easy deployment to GitHub pages. This allows for contributors who feel the documentation is lacking in certain areas to simply perform a pull request and submit a markdown file alongside with the appropriate front matter (metadata about the content). Should the pull request be accepted the code will automatically be pushed to the live website via [GitHub Actions][github-ci] and published to drupalwxt.
